summary: Verified the new SINGLE engin detail panel on /tour/index and the Dashboard fitBounds fix on /tagdashboard/index. After login admin/user@1234, dashboard renders WITHOUT the previous 'Cannot read properties of null (reading fitBounds)' runtime error overlay (zero pageerrors captured). On the Map page, clicking the violet '25' cluster (Morocco) spiderfied to 25 individual red pioIcon markers; clicking one of them opened data-testid='engin-detail-panel' (SINGLE mode) on the right. Panel verified: red 'SORTI / INACTIF' status badge (lt-cp-single-badge) at top, close X (data-testid='engin-panel-close'), title='Souris' (engin reference), chip='Réception' (famille), 3 stats (Dernier signal=16 mois, Batterie=9%, Zone actuelle=Omniyat). Two section titles found ('TIMELINE RÉCENTE' and 'INFORMATIONS'). Timeline shows the bucket entry (Sorti/inactif 24/12/2024 17:51) and 'Durée depuis 16 mois'. Informations lists address (P3012, Tamaris, Nouaceur Province, Maroc), état (exit) and GPS (33.00000, -7.00000). Close X button closes the panel; reopening + backdrop click (data-testid='engin-panel-backdrop') also closes the panel. All 6 review checkpoints PASS.

issues: Mixed Content warnings: Google tile layer requested over http:// from an https:// page (mt0/mt1/mt2/mt3.google.com/vt/...). Tiles still load thanks to browser auto-upgrade but warnings flood the console. Switch tile URLs to https:// in the map provider config.

React warnings: duplicate 'key' props in PrivateRoutes / SidebarMenuMain / ChatMessage; non-boolean attribute 'full' on <button>; forwardRef render function param warning; createSlice.extraReducers deprecation. Cosmetic, not blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Switch Google tile URL scheme from http:// to https:// to silence Mixed Content warnings on the Map page.
(Optional, carried over) Cleanup React duplicate-key warnings and the boolean attr 'full' warning.
critical_code_review_comments: ClusterInsightsPanel.jsx isSingle branch (lines 137-300) is well-isolated and reuses the same chrome CSS (.lt-cluster-panel, .lt-cluster-backdrop) as the cluster mode — good DRY. data-testid coverage is complete (engin-detail-panel, engin-panel-close, engin-panel-backdrop, engin-detail-content).
MapComponent.js fitBounds guard prevents the prior 'reading fitBounds of null' crash on Dashboard mount — verified zero pageerrors after the fix.
MapComponent.js is still very large (>2000 lines). Recommend extracting cluster/marker/icon factories into separate modules (carried-over comment from iter 55).
context_for_next_testing_agent: To trigger the SINGLE engin panel reliably: login admin/user@1234 -> click sidebar a[href='/tour/index'] -> wait for .my-custom-cluster (2 clusters: '6' near Lyon/Renens and '25' in Morocco) -> click the '25' cluster: it spiderfies into 25 leaflet img markers (img.leaflet-marker-icon) -> click any of them -> data-testid='engin-detail-panel' opens. The cluster of '6' opens the cluster panel directly (markers are stacked <50m, expected). Backdrop = data-testid='engin-panel-backdrop'; close = data-testid='engin-panel-close'. Dashboard /tagdashboard/index now mounts cleanly (no fitBounds null error overlay).
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works as designed; bug fix verified.
